metadata.documentationSummary: Desktop entry points documented in desktop/main.ts comments. Build scripts documented. electron-builder.yml has packaging config for all platforms.

workerRuns.summary: Scaffolded Flow Desktop shell. Electron main imports flow internals directly (DashboardState, loadFlowConfig), serves existing dashboard via local express server on random port. esbuild bundles main/preload. App launches, dashboard healthz responds. No separate package — desktop lives inside flow as an entry point.

workerResults.summary: Scaffolded Flow Desktop shell. Electron main imports flow internals directly (DashboardState, loadFlowConfig), serves existing dashboard via local express server on random port. esbuild bundles main/preload. App launches, dashboard healthz responds. No separate package — desktop lives inside flow as an entry point.
